bookTheme: The Lamb Reigns and Makes All Things New

divisions.title: Letters to Seven Churches
divisions.theme: Vision of Christ and church messages
divisions.summary: John's vision of the risen Christ and messages to the seven churches in Asia

divisions.title: Throne and Seals
divisions.summary: Throne room worship, the Lamb opens the scroll, seven seals of judgment

divisions.title: Trumpets and Witnesses
divisions.summary: Seven trumpets sound, the little scroll, two witnesses prophesy and are killed

divisions.title: Conflict and Bowls
divisions.summary: The woman and the dragon, beasts from sea and earth, seven last plagues and bowls of wrath

divisions.title: Fall of Babylon and New Jerusalem
divisions.summary: Fall of Babylon, marriage supper of the Lamb, final judgment, new heaven and new earth, new Jerusalem

chapterSummaries.1: John's vision of the risen Christ among the lampstands
chapterSummaries.2: Letters to the churches in Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, and Thyatira
chapterSummaries.3: Letters to the churches in Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea
chapterSummaries.4: The throne in heaven, four living creatures, and twenty-four elders
chapterSummaries.5: The Lamb who was slain is worthy to open the scroll
chapterSummaries.6: The Lamb opens the first six seals of judgment
chapterSummaries.7: 144,000 sealed from Israel, great multitude from every nation
chapterSummaries.8: Seventh seal, golden censer, first four trumpets sound
chapterSummaries.9: Fifth and sixth trumpets, demonic locusts and army
chapterSummaries.10: Angel with the little scroll, John eats the scroll
chapterSummaries.11: Two witnesses prophesy, are killed, and raised, seventh trumpet
chapterSummaries.12: The woman, the dragon, and war in heaven
chapterSummaries.13: Beast from the sea and beast from the earth, mark of the beast
chapterSummaries.14: The Lamb and the 144,000, three angels, harvest of the earth
chapterSummaries.15: Seven angels with seven last plagues, song of Moses and the Lamb
chapterSummaries.16: Seven bowls of God's wrath poured out on the earth
chapterSummaries.17: The great prostitute Babylon rides the beast, her judgment
chapterSummaries.18: Fall of Babylon the Great, lament over her destruction
chapterSummaries.19: Hallelujah, marriage supper of the Lamb, Christ returns on white horse
chapterSummaries.20: Thousand-year reign, Satan bound and released, final judgment
chapterSummaries.21: New heaven and new earth, new Jerusalem descends from heaven
chapterSummaries.22: River of life, tree of life, Jesus is coming soon, invitation
